posts.text:
Our Democracy is deeply broken. 

$35.2 MILLION dollars for just a few races. We must End Citizens United and get big money out of politics.


AdImpact Politics (@AdImpact_Pol)

Next week is primary day in #ILPol!

With five open House seats, Illinois U.S. House primaries have seen $35.2M in ad spending and reservations, a 935% increase from the 2023–24 cycle.

Democratic advertisers account for 99% of ad spending.





— https://nitter.net/AdImpact_Pol/status/2031398285534020038#m

Like clock work. Whenever Republicans run the government, they trash the economy. Prices go up. 10 of the last 11 recessions were under Republican Presidents. They’re really bad at this.


The Kobeissi Letter (@KobeissiLetter)

BREAKING: US oil prices officially surge above $104/barrel for the first time since July 2022.

US oil prices are now up +90% since the December low.





— https://nitter.net/KobeissiLetter/status/2030766432305262660#m

Congress ain’t passing any bills anyways so 🤷🏾‍♂️


Political Polls (@PpollingNumbers)

President Trump says he will not sign any bills into law until the SAVE America Act is passed.





— https://nitter.net/PpollingNumbers/status/2030622690382360805#m
At the funeral of Rev. Jesse Jackson. Rep. Jones and I walk in his footsteps. Our story isn’t possible without the work, advocacy, Organizing, and struggle of Rev. Jackson. Rest in power.
